name: No-Meat Burgers-in-a-Hurry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mashed tofu, rolled oats, wheat germ, onion (if using), and finely minced onion together.
2. Add onion powder, soy sauce, salt, basil, oregano, garlic powder, and black pepper to the mixture. Combine well.
3. Knead the mixture for a few minutes until it becomes firm and cohesive.
4. Shape the mixture into six patties.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
6. Fry the patties on a lightly oiled cookie sheet at 325°F (163°C) for 25 minutes, turning once halfway through the cooking time.
7. Serve the patties on whole wheat bread or buns. Top with lettuce, tomato, alfalfa sprouts, grated carrot, onion, pickles, catsup, or mustard.
